name: Chat with a database using AI
description: Ask questions about data in a BigQuery database using natural language. Takes a question and database context, uses Claude to generate a SQL query, executes it via BigQuery, then uses Claude again to summarize the results in plain English. Results are posted to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Chat with a database using AI

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting results

question.description: Natural language question about the data

schemaHint.description: Optional schema description (table names, columns, types) to help AI generate accurate SQL

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the answer

steps.name: Save SQL generation prompt to temp file
Parse Claude SQL output (strip code fences)
Format query results for AI analysis
Build prompt to summarize query results
Save summary prompt to temp file
Parse Claude summary output (strip code fences)
